repo.description: A Implementation of SpecAugment with Tensorflow & Pytorch, introduced by Google Brain

terms.context_snippet: This is a implementation of SpecAugment that speech data augmentation method which directly process the spectrogram with Tensorflow & Pytorch, introduced by Google Brain[1]. This is currently under the Apache 2.0, Please feel free to use for your project. Enjoy!
